{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Zakareth's throne
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The throne is a solid block of [[ruby]] ornamented in lines of gold.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c17">''City of Light'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
